_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to develop a risk defense plan to put active measure in place in defense of a network
reference_document_element_description: Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack surfaces, threat actors, and applicable mitigating controls.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.468), RM-A-004 (RM, cosine: 0.448).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.423). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [ability, active, defense, develop, measure, network] vs WIDAI-only terms [actors, ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.870, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Ability to develop a risk defense plan to put active measure in place in defense" and "Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.470 ≈ STS 0.423 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [ability, active, defense, develop, measure, network]. WIDAI terms: [actors, ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct].
